title: ON VEHICLE SERVICE — Differential Side Oil Seal

figures_detected.description: Illustration showing the differential side oil seal location on the vehicle, with the seal labeled
Diagram showing left side and right side of differential with 0.5 mm (max) installation dimension indicators for oil seal level difference

steps.text: Remove drive shaft from vehicle. Refer to FA, "Drive Shaft".
Pry off the differential side oil seal with a screwdriver.

content_blocks.text: Always replace the oil seal with a new part. Do not reuse.
Be careful not to scratch the case.

steps.text: Using a drift, insert oil seal so it conforms to the following dimensions.

rows.drift_dimensions: Outer dia. 56 mm, Inner dia. 46 mm
rows.installation_dimensions: Level difference with case and surface = 0.5 mm max.

rows.drift_dimensions: Outer dia. 56 mm, Inner dia. 46 mm
rows.installation_dimensions: Level difference with case and surface = 0.5 mm max.

tools_referenced.name: Drift
tools_referenced.usage: Insert oil seal to correct installation depth

tools_referenced.name: Screwdriver
tools_referenced.usage: Pry off differential side oil seal during removal

model_notes: RE0F05A model. Right side and left side oil seal drift dimensions are the same: Outer dia. 56 mm, Inner dia. 46 mm. Installation level difference with case surface = 0.5 mm max. for both sides.
